special_mechanics.name: Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Pinball game featuring ball bouncing mechanics off paddles and bumpers. Unused graphics show pop-up bumpers were considered but not implemented; ball bounces off fixed slingshots without pop-up animations.

special_mechanics.name: Bonus Game Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Bonus game featuring Lady (Pauline) character that walks and falls off an edge. Bonus game ends immediately when she falls below the paddle.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is a pinball simulation game, not a platformer with traditional player character movement. Available sources contain no movement, gravity, or jump physics parameters. Game mechanics focus on ball physics simulation rather than character-based physics. Bonus game features character movement but specific movement parameters are not documented.
